description_long: This is a modern, two-seater chaise upholstered in a smooth, light beige material, likely leather or faux leather. The chaise features a clean, boxy silhouette with straight lines and minimal ornamentation, giving it a contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. Both sides are equipped with armrests of equal height and width, and the backrest runs the full length of the seating area, providing ample support. Two loose, matching cushions are placed at each end, enhancing comfort and visual symmetry. The legs are short, blocky, and dark-colored, slightly elevating the chaise above the ground. The overall design is sleek and functional, making it ideal for public spaces, lobbies, or upscale outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern, light beige two-seater chaise with straight armrests, a full-length backrest, and two matching cushions. Its sleek, boxy design and dark block legs give it a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seating area, both armrests, and two loose cushions placed at each end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the backrest and cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the tops of the two cushions, with no visible seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and cushion profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, full-length, and of medium height, providing continuous support across the entire seating area. It is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, straight and boxy, matching the height of the backrest and seamlessly integrated into the overall design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, block-shaped, and dark in color, likely made of wood or metal, with a simple, sturdy construction and no decorative detailing.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid and smooth, with no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting, contributing to a clean and minimalist appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two loose, rectangular cushions placed at each end of the chaise, matching the upholstery and providing additional comfort and symmetry. The seat and backrest cushions appear to be integrated and not removable.
